question: List the order date of the orders who are placed by customers with at least 2 payment methods.
sql: SELECT date_order_placed FROM Orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(payment_method_code) >= 2)

back_translation.intent: 获取具有至少两种支付方式的客户的订单日期
filters: customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(payment_method_code) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求获取有至少2种支付方式的客户对应的订单日期，SQL描述通过子查询筛选出满足条件的customer_id，并正确关联Orders和Customer_Payment_Methods表，最终结果列和过滤逻辑均匹配。
